The address uses the image://design-source/vi-onepager/p-1 scheme
MIME is image/jpeg but w and h are both 0
Body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — vi-onepager/p-1.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image/jpeg record
links array is empty so no explicit relationships are declared

No content description, alt text, or visual summary of the image
Empty links means provenance/relationships to other design artifacts are not captured
notes: A terse metadata stub for a design-source JPEG page asset, with zero dimensions and no outgoing links.
